title: Twilight Forest/Origins fix
description: Fixes a compatibility issue between The Twilight Forest and Origins mods. Fixes a bug where the game would crash when approaching Naga.
body:
##  Fixes a compatibility issue between The Twilight Forest and Origins mods.


Fixes a bug where the game would crash when approaching Naga.

Works with **Origins via the Synitra Connector** and **forge Twilight forest**.


Tested with: 
- Origins 1.10.2
- Twilight forest 4.3.2508
- Sinytra Connector beta 48+

Have nice day and modpacks (o゜▽゜)o☆
